description.value:
Frequency once per hour

Effect You unleash your full majesty for all to see. You attempt an Intimidation check to [[/act demoralize]] all enemies within 100 feet. Allies within 100 feet gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves and Will DCs for 1 round. If you successfully Demoralize at least one creature this way, your allies gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Unleash Majesty]

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Unleash Majesty (Successful Demoralize)]
